# Description

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link the roadmap issue/milestone. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Code change (PR track)
- [ ] Protocol change (requires an accepted RFC — link it)

## Checklist (Definition of Done)

- [ ] Tests pass and cover the change (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Docs updated (package README / ADR / spec as applicable)
- [ ] Changeset added for user-facing changes (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Respects the ownership model (ADR-0004) and protocol versioning (ADR-0002)
- [ ] `pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck` are clean
